title: oberna nivea
intro: Oberna nivea, also known as the white-stemmed Oberna, is a perennial plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oberna nivea include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Oberna nivea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
